hero_subtitle: 50-year-old Boston architecture firm specializing in public safety, religious, multifamily housing, and municipal projects across New England.
service_area_description: Serving Boston, Cambridge, and communities throughout Massachusetts and New England.
seo_title: Context Architecture | Architecture Firm in Boston, MA
seo_description: Context Architecture in Boston, MA. 50 years of award-winning design for public safety, religious, multifamily housing, and municipal projects across New England.
services_subtitle: Diverse architectural practice rooted in active listening, sustainable design, and creative problem-solving.
reviews_subtitle: Municipalities, faith communities, and housing authorities choose Context for projects that matter.
cta_subtitle: Schedule a consultation. 50 years of experience in projects that serve communities and stand the test of time.
footer_description: Award-winning Boston architecture firm. 50 years of public safety, religious, housing, and municipal design across New England.

services_featured.name: Public Safety Facilities
services_featured.description: Police stations, fire stations, and emergency services buildings designed for operational excellence, durability, and community integration.

services_secondary.name: Religious & Worship Spaces
services_secondary.description: Sacred spaces that honor tradition while meeting modern accessibility, sustainability, and community gathering needs.

services_accent.name: Multifamily Housing
services_accent.description: Residential communities designed for livability, sustainability, and long-term value. LEED-accredited team.

services_wide.name: Municipal & Civic
services_wide.description: Libraries, town halls, community centers, and public buildings that serve residents and reflect civic pride.

about_features.title: Active Listening
about_features.description: Every project starts with understanding your vision. We listen first, then design solutions that exceed expectations.

about_features.title: Sustainable Design
about_features.description: LEED-accredited practice committed to environmentally responsible design that reduces operational costs.

about_features.title: Community Engagement
about_features.description: We design spaces that bring people together. Public input and stakeholder collaboration drive every project.

reviews.name: Municipal Client
reviews.text: Context Architecture delivered a public safety building that exceeded our operational requirements while staying under budget. Their understanding of first responder workflows is unmatched.

reviews.name: Faith Community Leader
reviews.text: They honored our traditions while creating a space that serves our growing congregation beautifully. The community engagement process was incredibly thoughtful.

reviews.name: Housing Authority Director
reviews.text: 50 years of experience shows in every detail. Context delivered a multifamily project that residents are proud to call home.
